CustomField.description: Latest calendar date by which a Visit of this work type should be scheduled. Used to enforce seasonal survey windows (e.g., sage-grouse lek surveys must complete by April 30; botanical surveys must fall within June–August). Leave blank for work types with no seasonal constraint.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Seasonal window close date. Visits should not be scheduled after this date for this work type.
CustomField.label: Survey Window End
